nasb.text: and I will bring you into the wilderness of the peoples, and there I will enter into judgment with you face to face.

esv.text: And I will bring you into the wilderness of the peoples, and there I will enter into judgment with you face to face.

cnv.text: 我要把你們帶到萬族的曠野，在那裡當面審判你們。

ccb.text: 领你们进入外族人的旷野，面对面地审判你们，
